| children = {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}, {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035}}, etc.
| shrine = {{ill|Taru-hime Shrine|ja|多留姫神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 多留姫の滝|1=Taruhime Falls|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430989}}?
| related_clans = {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|WD=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan}}, {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}
}}

'''Tamaru-hime''' (多満留姫) is a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (earthly deity) and a goddess in the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a belief system native to the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}.

[[File:Tamaru-hime_Shrine_1.jpg|thumb|200px|Taru-hime Shrine]]

== Overview ==
Tamaru-hime is said to be the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}.<ref>"Shincho Shrine Introduction: {{ill|Moriya Shrine|lt=Moriya Shrine|lt=Moreya Shrine|ja|洩矢神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moreya Shrine|qq=}}," {{ill|Nagano Shrine Agency|ja|長野県神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Shrine Agency|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinja-cho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590703}} official website.</ref><ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 31–34.</ref>

In the {{ill|Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tamaru-hime is described as the consort of Izuhaya no Mikoto. Another source alternatively claims that she was married to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and gave birth to Izuhaya no Mikoto.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, "Revised Suwa Genealogy," ''Suwa Genealogy, Vol. 2,'' Iida Kotaro, 1921, p. 19.</ref>

The goddess is sometimes referred to as '''Tamaru-hime no Mikoto''' (多留姫命). However, in most contexts, she is distinguished from {{ill|Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja|多留比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who is commonly regarded as a child of Takeminakata.<ref>Morii Mikio, "Genealogy of Takeminakata," ''Suwa Shrine Historical Records,'' Nakamura Jinnosuke, 1910, p. 10.</ref>

== Lineage ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage (from {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} to {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}).]]

Tamaru-hime is the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and the sister of {{ill|Moritaku-no-Kami|ja|洩宅神|1=Moritaku-no-Kami|2=ja|3=守宅神|lt=Moritaku-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritaku-no-Kami|qq=}}.<ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 33–34.</ref>

She married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}. Together, they had the following children:
* {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216}}
* {{ill|Wakagi-hime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakagi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776}}
* {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035}}
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}

}}

'''Tamaru-hime''' (多満留姫) is a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (earthly deity) and a goddess in the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a belief system native to the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}.

[[File:Tamaru-hime_Shrine_1.jpg|thumb|200px|Taru-hime Shrine]]

== Overview ==
Tamaru-hime is said to be the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}.<ref>"Shincho Shrine Introduction: {{ill|Moriya Shrine|lt=Moriya Shrine|lt=Moreya Shrine|ja|洩矢神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moreya Shrine|qq=}}," {{ill|Nagano Shrine Agency|ja|長野県神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Shrine Agency|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinja-cho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590703}} official website.</ref><ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 31–34.</ref>

In the {{ill|Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tamaru-hime is described as the consort of Izuhaya no Mikoto. Another source alternatively claims that she was married to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and gave birth to Izuhaya no Mikoto.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, "Revised Suwa Genealogy," ''Suwa Genealogy, Vol. 2,'' Iida Kotaro, 1921, p. 19.</ref>

The goddess is sometimes referred to as '''Tamaru-hime no Mikoto''' (多留姫命). However, in most contexts, she is distinguished from {{ill|Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja|多留比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who is commonly regarded as a child of Takeminakata.<ref>Morii Mikio, "Genealogy of Takeminakata," ''Suwa Shrine Historical Records,'' Nakamura Jinnosuke, 1910, p. 10.</ref>

== Lineage ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage (from {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} to {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}).]]

Tamaru-hime is the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and the sister of {{ill|Moritaku-no-Kami|ja|洩宅神|1=Moritaku-no-Kami|2=ja|3=守宅神|lt=Moritaku-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritaku-no-Kami|qq=}}.<ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 33–34.</ref>

She married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}. Together, they had the following children:
* {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216}}
* {{ill|Wakagi-hime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakagi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776}}
* {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035}}
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}

'''Tamaru-hime''' (多満留姫) is a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (earthly deity) and a goddess in the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a belief system native to the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}.

[[File:Tamaru-hime_Shrine_1.jpg|thumb|200px|Taru-hime Shrine]]

== Overview ==
Tamaru-hime is said to be the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}.<ref>"Shincho Shrine Introduction: {{ill|Moriya Shrine|lt=Moriya Shrine|lt=Moreya Shrine|ja|洩矢神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moreya Shrine|qq=}}," {{ill|Nagano Shrine Agency|ja|長野県神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Shrine Agency|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinja-cho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590703}} official website.</ref><ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 31–34.</ref>

In the {{ill|Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tamaru-hime is described as the consort of Izuhaya no Mikoto. Another source alternatively claims that she was married to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and gave birth to Izuhaya no Mikoto.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, "Revised Suwa Genealogy," ''Suwa Genealogy, Vol. 2,'' Iida Kotaro, 1921, p. 19.</ref>

The goddess is sometimes referred to as '''Tamaru-hime no Mikoto''' (多留姫命). However, in most contexts, she is distinguished from {{ill|Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja|多留比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who is commonly regarded as a child of Takeminakata.<ref>Morii Mikio, "Genealogy of Takeminakata," ''Suwa Shrine Historical Records,'' Nakamura Jinnosuke, 1910, p. 10.</ref>

== Lineage ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage (from {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} to {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}).]]

Tamaru-hime is the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and the sister of {{ill|Moritaku-no-Kami|ja|洩宅神|1=Moritaku-no-Kami|2=ja|3=守宅神|lt=Moritaku-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritaku-no-Kami|qq=}}.<ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 33–34.</ref>

She married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}. Together, they had the following children:
* {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216}}
* {{ill|Wakagi-hime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakagi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776}}
* {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035}}
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}

== Overview ==
Tamaru-hime is said to be the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}.<ref>"Shincho Shrine Introduction: {{ill|Moriya Shrine|lt=Moriya Shrine|lt=Moreya Shrine|ja|洩矢神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moreya Shrine|qq=}}," {{ill|Nagano Shrine Agency|ja|長野県神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Shrine Agency|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinja-cho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590703}} official website.</ref><ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 31–34.</ref>

In the {{ill|Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tamaru-hime is described as the consort of Izuhaya no Mikoto. Another source alternatively claims that she was married to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and gave birth to Izuhaya no Mikoto.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, "Revised Suwa Genealogy," ''Suwa Genealogy, Vol. 2,'' Iida Kotaro, 1921, p. 19.</ref>

The goddess is sometimes referred to as '''Tamaru-hime no Mikoto''' (多留姫命). However, in most contexts, she is distinguished from {{ill|Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja|多留比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who is commonly regarded as a child of Takeminakata.<ref>Morii Mikio, "Genealogy of Takeminakata," ''Suwa Shrine Historical Records,'' Nakamura Jinnosuke, 1910, p. 10.</ref>

== Lineage ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage (from {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} to {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}).]]

Tamaru-hime is the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and the sister of {{ill|Moritaku-no-Kami|ja|洩宅神|1=Moritaku-no-Kami|2=ja|3=守宅神|lt=Moritaku-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritaku-no-Kami|qq=}}.<ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 33–34.</ref>

She married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}. Together, they had the following children:
* {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216}}
* {{ill|Wakagi-hime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakagi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776}}
* {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035}}
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}

'''Tamaru-hime''' (多満留姫) is a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (earthly deity) and a goddess in the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a belief system native to the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}.

[[File:Tamaru-hime_Shrine_1.jpg|thumb|200px|Taru-hime Shrine]]

Tamaru-hime is said to be the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami}} and married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome}}.<ref>"Shincho Shrine Introduction: {{ill|Moriya Shrine|lt=Moriya Shrine|lt=Moreya Shrine|ja|洩矢神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moreya Shrine|qq=}}," {{ill|Nagano Shrine Agency|ja|長野県神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Shrine Agency|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinja-cho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590703}} official website.</ref><ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 31–34.</ref>

In the {{ill|Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tamaru-hime is described as the consort of Izuhaya no Mikoto. Another source alternatively claims that she was married to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and gave birth to Izuhaya no Mikoto.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, "Revised Suwa Genealogy," ''Suwa Genealogy, Vol. 2,'' Iida Kotaro, 1921, p. 19.</ref>

The goddess is sometimes referred to as '''Tamaru-hime no Mikoto''' (多留姫命). However, in most contexts, she is distinguished from {{ill|Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja|多留比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who is commonly regarded as a child of Takeminakata.<ref>Morii Mikio, "Genealogy of Takeminakata," ''Suwa Shrine Historical Records,'' Nakamura Jinnosuke, 1910, p. 10.</ref>

| children = {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}, {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}, etc.

| related_clans = {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|WD=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}}, {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}
}}

'''Tamaru-hime''' (多満留姫) is a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (earthly deity) and a goddess in the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a belief system native to the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}.

[[File:Tamaru-hime_Shrine_1.jpg|thumb|200px|Taru-hime Shrine]]

== Overview ==
Tamaru-hime is said to be the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} and married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome|1=Yasakatome}}.<ref>"Shincho Shrine Introduction: {{ill|Moriya Shrine|lt=Moriya Shrine|lt=Moreya Shrine|ja|洩矢神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moreya Shrine|qq=}}," {{ill|Nagano Shrine Agency|ja|長野県神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Shrine Agency|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinjachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590703}} official website.</ref><ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 31–34.</ref>

In the {{ill|Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tamaru-hime is described as the consort of Izuhaya no Mikoto. Another source alternatively claims that she was married to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and gave birth to Izuhaya no Mikoto.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, "Revised Suwa Genealogy," ''Suwa Genealogy, Vol. 2,'' Iida Kotaro, 1921, p. 19.</ref>

The goddess is sometimes referred to as '''Tamaru-hime no Mikoto''' (多留姫命). However, in most contexts, she is distinguished from {{ill|Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja|多留比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who is commonly regarded as a child of Takeminakata.<ref>Morii Mikio, "Genealogy of Takeminakata," ''Suwa Shrine Historical Records,'' Nakamura Jinnosuke, 1910, p. 10.</ref>

== Lineage ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage (from {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} to {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}).]]

Tamaru-hime is the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} and the sister of {{ill|Moritaku-no-Kami|ja|洩宅神|1=Moritaku-no-Kami|2=ja|3=守宅神|lt=Moritaku-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritaku-no-Kami|qq=}}.<ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 33–34.</ref>

She married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome|1=Yasakatome}}. Together, they had the following children:
* {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}
* {{ill|Wakagi-hime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakagi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}
* {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}

'''Tamaru-hime''' (多満留姫) is a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (earthly deity) and a goddess in the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a belief system native to the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}.

[[File:Tamaru-hime_Shrine_1.jpg|thumb|200px|Taru-hime Shrine]]

== Overview ==
Tamaru-hime is said to be the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} and married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome|1=Yasakatome}}.<ref>"Shincho Shrine Introduction: {{ill|Moriya Shrine|lt=Moriya Shrine|lt=Moreya Shrine|ja|洩矢神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moreya Shrine|qq=}}," {{ill|Nagano Shrine Agency|ja|長野県神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Shrine Agency|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinjachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590703}} official website.</ref><ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 31–34.</ref>

In the {{ill|Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tamaru-hime is described as the consort of Izuhaya no Mikoto. Another source alternatively claims that she was married to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and gave birth to Izuhaya no Mikoto.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, "Revised Suwa Genealogy," ''Suwa Genealogy, Vol. 2,'' Iida Kotaro, 1921, p. 19.</ref>

The goddess is sometimes referred to as '''Tamaru-hime no Mikoto''' (多留姫命). However, in most contexts, she is distinguished from {{ill|Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja|多留比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who is commonly regarded as a child of Takeminakata.<ref>Morii Mikio, "Genealogy of Takeminakata," ''Suwa Shrine Historical Records,'' Nakamura Jinnosuke, 1910, p. 10.</ref>

== Lineage ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage (from {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} to {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}).]]

Tamaru-hime is the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} and the sister of {{ill|Moritaku-no-Kami|ja|洩宅神|1=Moritaku-no-Kami|2=ja|3=守宅神|lt=Moritaku-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritaku-no-Kami|qq=}}.<ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 33–34.</ref>

She married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome|1=Yasakatome}}. Together, they had the following children:
* {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}
* {{ill|Wakagi-hime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakagi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}
* {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}

'''Tamaru-hime''' (多満留姫) is a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} (earthly deity) and a goddess in the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a belief system native to the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}.

[[File:Tamaru-hime_Shrine_1.jpg|thumb|200px|Taru-hime Shrine]]

== Overview ==
Tamaru-hime is said to be the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} and married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome|1=Yasakatome}}.<ref>"Shincho Shrine Introduction: {{ill|Moriya Shrine|lt=Moriya Shrine|lt=Moreya Shrine|ja|洩矢神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moreya Shrine|qq=}}," {{ill|Nagano Shrine Agency|ja|長野県神社庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Shrine Agency|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神社庁|1=Jinjachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11590703}} official website.</ref><ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 31–34.</ref>

In the {{ill|Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genealogy of the Moriya clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tamaru-hime is described as the consort of Izuhaya no Mikoto. Another source alternatively claims that she was married to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and gave birth to Izuhaya no Mikoto.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, "Revised Suwa Genealogy," ''Suwa Genealogy, Vol. 2,'' Iida Kotaro, 1921, p. 19.</ref>

The goddess is sometimes referred to as '''Tamaru-hime no Mikoto''' (多留姫命). However, in most contexts, she is distinguished from {{ill|Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja|多留比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taru-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, who is commonly regarded as a child of Takeminakata.<ref>Morii Mikio, "Genealogy of Takeminakata," ''Suwa Shrine Historical Records,'' Nakamura Jinnosuke, 1910, p. 10.</ref>

== Lineage ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage (from {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} to {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}).]]

Tamaru-hime is the daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|WD=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} and the sister of {{ill|Moritaku-no-Kami|ja|洩宅神|1=Moritaku-no-Kami|2=ja|3=守宅神|lt=Moritaku-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritaku-no-Kami|qq=}}.<ref>"Genealogy of the Moriya clan," {{ill|Suwa Historical Association|ja|諏訪教育会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Historical Association|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, 1936, pp. 33–34.</ref>

She married {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome|1=Yasakatome}}. Together, they had the following children:
* {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}
* {{ill|Wakagi-hime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakagi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}
* {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}
